title: Can I set custom fields about a board through a mutation?
excerpt: Hello! I’m trying to figure out if it’s possible to create custom fields about a board which I can add information to with a mutation. I’m not talking items on a board, I’m thinking more of fields ABOUT the board, like t…

posts.author: Sina (Sina Sultani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’m trying to figure out if it’s possible to create custom fields about a board which I can add information to with a mutation. I’m not talking items on a board, I’m thinking more of fields ABOUT the board, like this one:

For exampel, If i wanted to have two or three more fields, for example a status on the whole board instead of each activity, could I do that and then populate the field with a mutation?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Sina!

There is no way of adding new fields into a board as of today.

Please let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: Sina (Sina Sultani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Alright, then I know!
Thank you, Matias!
